entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A major threat to crop productivity caused by high temperatures, expected to increase due to climate change

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output from crop plants, heavily dependent on successful reproduction

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global environmental changes leading to more frequent and severe heat stress

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: The phase of plant growth where productivity is most vulnerable to heat stress

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An abiotic stress that impacts crop productivity

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: An abiotic stress that impacts crop productivity

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of plants to withstand and adapt to heat stress to maintain productivity

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that regulate gene expression and mediate the plant's response to heat stress

entities.name: OMICS STUDIES
entities.description: High-throughput analysis techniques used to understand molecular responses to heat stress

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: Techniques used to modify the genome of plants to enhance heat tolerance

entities.name: GENE EDITING
entities.description: Precise DNA modification techniques used to engineer transcription factors for heat tolerance

entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Agricultural plants targeted for the development of heat-resilient cultivars
